title: 8 Herbal Essential Oils to Alleviate Asthmatic Cough
description: Thymus vulgaris essential oils, commonly known as thyme oil, has been used for centuries to help alleviate coughs and other respiratory issues. This is due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which are primarily attributed to its active constituents like carvacrol and thymol. These compounds work together to combat the underlying causes of coughs, such as bacterial and viral infections, and reduce inflammation in the airways. When using thymus vulgaris essential oils...
